title: Web Development
description: Master full-stack web development from HTML basics to advanced frameworks and deployment.

stages.title: HTML & CSS Fundamentals
stages.description: Learn the building blocks of the web. Understand semantic HTML, CSS box model, flexbox, grid, and responsive design.
topics: Semantic HTML5 elements (header, main, section, article)
CSS box model: margin, border, padding, content
Web accessibility basics (ARIA, alt text, contrast)

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Page
projects.description: Build a multi-section portfolio with a hero, about, projects, and contact section using only HTML & CSS.

projects.title: Product Landing Page Clone
projects.description: Clone a real product page (e.g., Stripe or Vercel homepage) focusing on layout accuracy with Flexbox and Grid.

stages.title: JavaScript Essentials
stages.description: Master JavaScript fundamentals — variables, functions, DOM manipulation, events, async/await, and ES6+ features.
topics: Variables, data types, and type coercion
ES6+ features: arrow functions, destructuring, spread/rest, modules
Array methods: map, filter, reduce, find

projects.title: To-Do List App
projects.description: Build a fully functional to-do app with add, delete, complete, and filter features — no frameworks, pure JS.

projects.title: Weather App
projects.description: Fetch live weather data from OpenWeatherMap API and display it with dynamic UI updates based on conditions.

stages.title: Version Control with Git
stages.description: Learn Git for source control — branching, merging, pull requests, and collaboration workflows on GitHub.
topics: git init, add, commit, push, pull, clone
GitHub pull requests and code reviews

projects.title: Open Source First Contribution
projects.description: Find a beginner-friendly GitHub issue, fork the repo, make a fix, and open a pull request.

projects.title: Team Simulation
projects.description: Create two GitHub accounts and simulate a feature branch workflow with PR reviews on a shared project.

stages.title: React.js
stages.description: Build dynamic UIs with React — components, hooks, state management, React Router, and modern patterns.
topics: Core hooks: useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo
React Router v6 — nested routes, loaders
Performance: React.memo, lazy loading, code splitting

projects.title: E-Commerce Product Listing
projects.description: Build a product catalog with filtering, sorting, a cart, and checkout flow using React state and Context API.

projects.title: Real-Time Markdown Editor
projects.description: Create a split-pane editor that renders Markdown live, with localStorage persistence of drafts.

stages.title: Node.js & Express Backend
stages.description: Build server-side applications with Node.js and Express — REST APIs, middleware, authentication, and file handling.
topics: Node.js event loop and non-blocking I/O
JWT authentication and bcrypt password hashing

projects.title: Blog REST API
projects.description: Build a full CRUD REST API for a blog with user auth, protected routes, and Mongoose for MongoDB persistence.

projects.title: File Upload Service
projects.description: Create an Express service that accepts image uploads, resizes them with Sharp, and stores them locally or on S3.

stages.title: Databases & Deployment
stages.description: Learn SQL and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB), and deploy apps using services like Vercel, Railway, or AWS.
topics: SQL fundamentals: SELECT, JOIN, GROUP BY, subqueries
MongoDB document model and Mongoose ODM

projects.title: Full-Stack Notes App
projects.description: Build a notes app with React frontend, Express backend, and MongoDB — deployed end-to-end with auth.

projects.title: PostgreSQL Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Import a public CSV dataset into Postgres, write complex queries, and visualize results in a React dashboard.

title: Data Science
description: From statistics and Python to machine learning models and data storytelling.

stages.title: Python for Data Science
stages.description: Master Python basics, NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib for data manipulation and visualization.
topics: Python syntax: loops, functions, list comprehensions
Pandas DataFrames: load, inspect, filter, group
Handling missing data and data types
Matplotlib basic charts (line, bar, scatter, histogram)

projects.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
projects.description: Pick a public dataset (e.g., Titanic or Iris) and perform a full EDA: cleaning, stats, and 5+ visualizations.

projects.title: Student Grade Analyzer
projects.description: Build a CLI tool that reads a CSV of student grades and outputs statistics, rankings, and pass/fail summaries.

stages.title: Statistics & Mathematics
stages.description: Understand probability, descriptive statistics, hypothesis testing, and linear algebra for ML.
topics: Descriptive stats: mean, median, variance, standard deviation
Linear algebra: vectors, matrices, dot product, eigenvectors
Calculus basics: derivatives and gradients for ML

projects.title: A/B Test Analysis
projects.description: Simulate an A/B test dataset, run a t-test, calculate statistical significance, and write a conclusions report.

projects.title: Statistical Report
projects.description: Analyze a real-world dataset (e.g., COVID-19 data) and produce a statistics summary with hypothesis tests.

stages.title: Data Visualization
stages.description: Create compelling charts and dashboards using Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, and Tableau.
topics: Choosing the right chart type for your data
Color theory and accessibility in data viz

projects.title: Interactive COVID-19 Dashboard
projects.description: Build a Plotly Dash or Streamlit dashboard showing COVID-19 trends with filters by country and date range.

projects.title: Tableau Sales Analytics Workbook
projects.description: Connect Tableau to a sales dataset and build an executive dashboard with KPIs, trends, and drill-down filters.

stages.title: Machine Learning
stages.description: Learn supervised and unsupervised learning — regression, classification, clustering, and model evaluation with scikit-learn.
topics: Decision trees, random forests, gradient boosting
Model evaluation: accuracy, F1, ROC-AUC, confusion matrix

projects.title: House Price Prediction
projects.description: Train a regression model on the Kaggle Housing dataset, engineer features, tune hyperparameters, and submit predictions.

projects.title: Customer Churn Classifier
projects.description: Build a binary classifier to predict telecom customer churn, optimize for recall, and explain feature importance.

stages.title: Deep Learning & Neural Networks
stages.description: Dive into neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, and transformers using TensorFlow and PyTorch.
topics: Neural network architecture: layers, weights, biases
Batch normalization and dropout for regularization

projects.title: MNIST Digit Classifier
projects.description: Train a CNN from scratch on MNIST, achieve >99% accuracy, and build a web UI where users can draw digits.

projects.title: Sentiment Analysis with LSTM
projects.description: Train an LSTM on movie reviews to classify sentiment, compare with a fine-tuned BERT baseline.

stages.title: Big Data & MLOps
stages.description: Handle large datasets with Spark, deploy ML models to production, and monitor model performance.
topics: Apache Spark architecture and PySpark DataFrames
Model versioning and experiment tracking with MLflow
Monitoring model drift and data quality
A/B testing and shadow deployments in production

projects.title: PySpark Log Analysis Pipeline
projects.description: Process a multi-GB web server log dataset with PySpark, extract KPIs, and visualize trends in a notebook.

projects.title: MLflow Experiment Tracker
projects.description: Train 5 model variants with different hyperparameters, log all runs in MLflow, and compare results in the UI.

title: Cloud Computing
description: Learn to design, deploy, and manage scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, or GCP.

stages.title: Cloud Fundamentals
stages.description: Understand cloud service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS), deployment models, and core cloud concepts.
topics: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS — when to use each
Public, private, and hybrid cloud models
IAM: users, roles, policies, least privilege
Regions, availability zones, and edge locations
Cloud billing and cost management basics

projects.title: Static Website on S3
projects.description: Deploy a static HTML/CSS site to an S3 bucket with public access, custom error pages, and CloudFront CDN.

projects.title: First EC2 Instance
projects.description: Launch an EC2 instance, SSH in, install Nginx, configure a security group, and serve a hello-world page.

stages.title: Networking & Security
stages.description: Master VPCs, subnets, security groups, load balancers, DNS, and cloud security best practices.
topics: Elastic Load Balancers and target groups

projects.title: Multi-Tier VPC Architecture
projects.description: Build a VPC with public and private subnets, a NAT gateway, bastion host, and an ALB routing to private EC2s.

projects.title: CloudFront Distribution
projects.description: Set up CloudFront in front of an S3 bucket with custom caching rules, geo-restrictions, and HTTPS redirect.

stages.title: Containers & Kubernetes
stages.description: Learn Docker containerization and Kubernetes orchestration for scalable application deployment.
topics: Services, Ingress, and DNS in K8s

projects.title: Containerize a Node.js App
projects.description: Dockerize an Express API with a multi-stage build, push to DockerHub, and run with docker-compose alongside MongoDB.

projects.title: K8s Microservice Deployment
projects.description: Deploy a two-service app (frontend + backend) to a local k8s cluster (minikube) with Ingress and ConfigMaps.

stages.title: Infrastructure as Code
stages.description: Automate cloud infrastructure provisioning using Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, or Pulumi.
topics: AWS CloudFormation stacks and change sets
GitOps: infrastructure changes via pull requests
Policy as code with Sentinel or OPA

projects.title: Terraform VPC Module
projects.description: Write a reusable Terraform module that provisions a full VPC with public/private subnets, NAT, and security groups.

projects.title: CloudFormation 3-Tier App
projects.description: Define a three-tier web app (ALB, EC2 ASG, RDS) in a CloudFormation template with nested stacks.

stages.title: CI/CD & DevOps
stages.description: Build automated pipelines using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or GitLab CI for continuous integration and deployment.
topics: Git branching strategies for CI/CD (trunk-based, Gitflow)
GitHub Actions: workflows, jobs, steps, runners
Build, test, lint, and security scan stages
Monitoring and alerting with CloudWatch / Datadog

projects.title: Full CI/CD Pipeline
projects.description: Build a GitHub Actions pipeline for a React + Node app: lint → test → build Docker image → push to ECR → deploy to ECS.

projects.title: Automated Testing Gate
projects.description: Add a CI stage that runs unit tests, integration tests, and blocks PRs from merging if coverage drops below 80%.

stages.title: Cloud Architecture
stages.description: Design resilient, scalable cloud architectures following Well-Architected Framework principles.
topics: High availability and fault tolerance patterns
Event-driven architecture with SQS, SNS, EventBridge
Serverless with Lambda and API Gateway

projects.title: Serverless REST API
projects.description: Build a fully serverless REST API using Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, and Cognito for auth — zero servers.

projects.title: Multi-Region Failover Design
projects.description: Architect and document a multi-region active-passive setup with Route 53 health checks and automated failover.

title: Artificial Intelligence
description: Explore AI fundamentals, NLP, computer vision, and build intelligent systems.

stages.title: AI Foundations & Python
stages.description: Understand AI history, types of AI, Python for AI, and mathematical prerequisites.
topics: History of AI and key milestones
Narrow AI vs general AI vs AGI
Machine learning vs deep learning vs AI
Python AI ecosystem: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, scikit-learn
Linear algebra refresher: vectors, matrices, transformations
Calculus: derivatives, chain rule, gradient intuition
Ethical AI considerations from day one

projects.title: Rule-Based Chatbot
projects.description: Build a command-line chatbot with pattern matching and scripted responses — no ML, just logic and NLP intuitions.

projects.title: Dataset Exploration Notebook
projects.description: Load 3 public datasets, compute statistics, plot distributions, and write observations in a structured notebook.

stages.title: Machine Learning Algorithms
stages.description: Master supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning algorithms and their applications.
topics: Decision trees and ensemble methods (random forest, XGBoost)

projects.title: Iris Flower Classifier
projects.description: Train 5 different classifiers on the Iris dataset, compare accuracy, and visualize decision boundaries.

projects.title: Titanic Survival Prediction
projects.description: Complete the Kaggle Titanic challenge: feature engineering, model stacking, and leaderboard submission.

stages.title: Natural Language Processing
stages.description: Process and analyze text using NLTK, spaCy, transformers, and large language models.

projects.title: Movie Review Sentiment Analyzer
projects.description: Fine-tune a BERT model on IMDb reviews and build a simple web UI to classify any movie review in real time.

projects.title: News Article Topic Classifier
projects.description: Scrape 1,000 news articles, label them by topic, train a TF-IDF + logistic regression vs BERT model, compare results.

stages.title: Computer Vision
stages.description: Build image recognition, object detection, and segmentation systems using CNNs and OpenCV.
topics: Image representation: pixels, channels, color spaces
OpenCV for image preprocessing and transformations
CNN architecture: Conv, Pool, Flatten, Dense layers
Object detection: YOLO, SSD, Faster R-CNN
Image segmentation: semantic vs instance (U-Net, Mask R-CNN)

projects.title: Face Mask Detection
projects.description: Train a binary classifier on a face mask dataset, deploy it to process a live webcam stream with OpenCV.

projects.title: Custom Object Detector
projects.description: Collect 200+ images of a custom object, label them with LabelImg, train YOLOv8, and evaluate on a test video.

stages.title: Generative AI & LLMs
stages.description: Work with GPT, LLaMA, and diffusion models. Build applications using LangChain and vector databases.
topics: Transformer architecture deep dive (attention, positional encoding)
Prompt engineering: few-shot, chain-of-thought, structured output
LangChain and LlamaIndex for LLM orchestration
LLM function calling and tool use
Evaluating LLM outputs: BLEU, ROUGE, human eval

projects.title: RAG Document Q&A Chatbot
projects.description: Build a chatbot that answers questions about a PDF using LangChain, a vector DB, and an LLM API.

projects.title: AI Code Review Tool
projects.description: Create a GitHub Action that uses an LLM to review PRs, flag issues, and suggest improvements as PR comments.

stages.title: AI Ethics & Deployment
stages.description: Understand AI ethics, bias, fairness, and deploy AI models responsibly using APIs and cloud services.
topics: Algorithmic bias: sources, types, and measurement
Fairness metrics: demographic parity, equalized odds
Privacy in AI: federated learning, differential privacy
Responsible AI frameworks (Google, Microsoft, EU AI Act)
Model serving with FastAPI and BentoML
API rate limiting, caching, and versioning
Monitoring model drift and data quality in production

projects.title: Fairness Audit
projects.description: Take a loan approval classifier, measure fairness metrics across demographic groups, and propose mitigation strategies.

projects.title: ML Model REST API
projects.description: Wrap a trained scikit-learn model in a FastAPI service, Dockerize it, and deploy to a cloud platform with docs.

title: Cybersecurity
description: Build expertise in network security, ethical hacking, and defending systems against threats.

stages.title: Security Fundamentals
stages.description: Learn core security concepts — CIA triad, threat modeling, attack types, and security frameworks.
topics: Common attack types: phishing, MitM, DDoS, ransomware

projects.title: Personal Security Hardening
projects.description: Set up a personal VPN, enable 2FA everywhere, audit your password manager, and document your security posture.

projects.title: Threat Model for a Fictional Company
projects.description: Apply the STRIDE framework to a small e-commerce app: identify assets, threats, mitigations, and residual risks.

stages.title: Networking & Protocols
stages.description: Understand TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/S, firewalls, VPNs, and how network attacks work.
topics: OSI model and TCP/IP stack layer by layer

projects.title: Wireshark Packet Analysis
projects.description: Capture traffic during a login, HTTP browse, and DNS query — analyze protocols, extract credentials from HTTP.

projects.title: Home Network Map
projects.description: Use nmap to scan your home network, identify all devices, open ports, and services — document your findings.

stages.title: Ethical Hacking & Pentesting
stages.description: Learn penetration testing methodologies, vulnerability scanning, and exploit techniques ethically.
topics: Pentest phases: recon, scanning, exploitation, post-exploitation, reporting
Passive recon: OSINT, Google dorking, Shodan
Active scanning with Nmap (flags, scripts, OS detection)
Privilege escalation: Linux (SUID, sudo) and Windows
Password attacks: Hashcat and John the Ripper

projects.title: TryHackMe CTF Room
projects.description: Complete the Mr Robot or Blue room on TryHackMe — document every step, tool used, and flag captured.

projects.title: HackTheBox Machine
projects.description: Own a retired HackTheBox machine, write a detailed walkthrough including recon → foothold → root.

stages.title: Web Application Security
stages.description: Master OWASP Top 10, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, authentication flaws, and web app pentesting.
topics: OWASP Top 10 (2021): injection, broken auth, IDOR, SSRF…
XSS: reflected, stored, DOM-based — bypass filters
CSRF: attack mechanism and SameSite cookie defense
JWT vulnerabilities: alg:none, weak secrets, claim tampering
Burp Suite: Proxy, Repeater, Intruder, Scanner
Authentication flaws: brute force, credential stuffing
Secure coding: parameterized queries, output encoding, CSP

projects.title: PortSwigger Labs
projects.description: Complete 10 Web Security Academy labs covering SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, and IDOR — screenshot each solved lab.

projects.title: DVWA Exploitation
projects.description: Attack Damn Vulnerable Web App at all 3 security levels, document every vulnerability and its fix.

stages.title: Digital Forensics & Incident Response
stages.description: Learn to investigate security incidents, analyze malware, and perform digital forensic analysis.
topics: Incident response lifecycle: prepare, detect, contain, eradicate, recover
Digital forensics methodology and chain of custody
Disk imaging and acquisition (FTK Imager, dd)
Log analysis: Windows Event Log, syslog, SIEM basics
Static malware analysis: strings, PE headers, imports

projects.title: Memory Dump Analysis
projects.description: Download a public malware memory dump, use Volatility to identify the malicious process, network connections, and IOCs.

projects.title: TryHackMe SOC Simulation
projects.description: Complete the SOC Level 1 path on TryHackMe — triage alerts, investigate incidents, and write an incident report.

stages.title: Cloud Security & Compliance
stages.description: Secure cloud environments, understand shared responsibility, and implement compliance frameworks.
topics: Shared responsibility model in-depth (AWS, Azure, GCP)
IAM: least privilege, role boundaries, SCPs
AWS Security Hub, GuardDuty, and Inspector
Common cloud misconfigurations: SSRF, public S3, IMDSv1
GDPR and CCPA data privacy requirements
PCI-DSS and HIPAA overview for cloud
CloudTrail and Config for audit and compliance automation
Red team vs blue team exercises in cloud environments

projects.title: AWS Account Security Audit
projects.description: Run Prowler or ScoutSuite against an AWS account, triage findings by severity, and remediate the top 5 issues.

projects.title: S3 Bucket Policy Review
projects.description: Enumerate S3 buckets in a test account, identify misconfigurations (public access, no encryption), and apply fixes.
